raw_result.description: Web deployment and hosting platform with APIs for sites, builds, deploys, forms, functions, and account resources.
raw_result.auth_notes: Netlify documents OAuth2 access tokens for third-party apps and personal access tokens sent as Bearer tokens for direct API use.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official pricing page shows Free tier support for 'Deploy from AI, Git, or API' and Netlify SDK, indicating self-serve API access without sales approval.

api_surface.breadth: Public REST API v1 with endpoints for sites, deploys, builds, forms, functions, environment variables, accounts, teams, and related resources; official docs describe it as Netlify's REST API at api.netlify.com/api/v1.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Netlify has an official MCP server repository, netlify/netlify-mcp, for project management and deployment workflows.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Netlify docs state a general API limit of 500 requests per minute, plus deploy trigger limits of 3 per minute and 100 per day.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official developer docs are public, auth is documented, free tier includes API-driven deploys, and Netlify publishes an official MCP server on GitHub.
